metadata.description: Evaluation tasks for MCP vs. Skill agent tool integration comparison
metadata.note: Issue and PR numbers are based on the setup_github.sh output. Adjust expected_output values if your actual numbers differ.

tasks.description: How many open issues in this repo are labeled `bug`?

expected_output.explanation: Open bugs: OTLP timeout (#74), Batch shutdown (#77), Config crash (#82), CI Python 3.12 (#83), JSON unicode (#85).

tasks.description: Who is assigned to issue #77 (Batch exporter drops last batch on shutdown)?

expected_output.explanation: Alice Chen is assigned to the batch exporter shutdown bug (#77).

tasks.description: What is the title of the most recently opened pull request?

expected_output.explanation: PR #88 is the most recently created PR.

tasks.description: Is issue #80 (Typo in README.md) assigned to anyone?

expected_output.explanation: The README typo issue has no assignee.

tasks.description: What labels are on the issue titled 'OTLP exporter fails silently on connection timeout'?

expected_output.explanation: The OTLP timeout issue has bug and exporter labels.

tasks.description: List all open issues labeled `bug` and check if any of them have a linked pull request. Which bugs have fixes in progress?

bugs_with_prs: Batch exporter drops last batch on shutdown
CI workflow doesn't run on Python 3.12
bugs_without_prs: OTLP exporter fails silently on connection timeout
Config file parser crashes on empty values
JSON file exporter doesn't handle unicode properly

expected_output.explanation: The batch shutdown bug has PR #86, the CI bug has PR #87. The OTLP timeout and config crash bugs have no PRs.

tasks.description: Look at the last 10 merged PRs. What percentage of them modified files in the `tests/` directory?

expected_output.explanation: setup_github.sh creates 3 open PRs but no merged PRs. The agent should report 0 merged PRs.

tasks.description: Find all open issues assigned to Alice. How many are bugs vs. enhancements?

expected_output.explanation: No issues are assigned to Alice — the setup script's assignee calls silently fail because the users don't exist on GitHub.

tasks.description: Which open issues are part of the v2.0 milestone? List them with their titles and labels.

value.title: Add support for custom span attributes
Add retry configuration to client constructor
Add gRPC transport option for OTLP exporter

expected_output.explanation: Four open issues are in the v2.0 milestone.

tasks.description: Are there any open PRs that don't have at least one review? List them.

expected_output.explanation: PR #86 has an approval from Bob. PRs #87 and #88 have no reviews.

tasks.description: Find all issues labeled `exporter`. How many are open vs. closed?

open_titles: OTLP exporter fails silently on connection timeout
Console exporter output is not configurable
Add gRPC transport option for OTLP exporter
JSON file exporter doesn't handle unicode properly

expected_output.explanation: 4 open exporter issues, 3 closed (OTLP batch drop, JSON file exporter added, console exporter added).

tasks.description: Create a new issue titled 'Add request timeout configuration' with the label `enhancement`, and add it to the v2.0 milestone.

checks: Issue exists with exact title 'Add request timeout configuration'
Issue is in the v2.0 milestone

tasks.description: The word 'recieve' appears in README.md. Create a branch called `fix/readme-typo`, fix the typo, commit with an appropriate message, push, and open a PR that references issue #80.

checks: A PR exists from fix/readme-typo to main
PR body or title references issue #80
Commit message is descriptive (e.g., 'fix: correct typo in README.md')
expected_output.note: Issue #80 is the typo issue. Agent should reference it.

tasks.description: Add the label `needs-triage` to issues #82 and #85.

expected_output.note: Issue #82 is the config crash bug, #85 is the unicode bug.

tasks.description: Close issue #80 (the README typo) with a comment saying 'Fixed in PR #X' (use the actual PR number if one exists, otherwise note that no PR was found).

checks: Issue #80 has a comment referencing a PR number or stating no PR exists
expected_output.note: If T13 was run first, a PR exists. Otherwise, the agent should note no PR was found.

tasks.description: Add a review comment to PR #87 saying 'LGTM — just verify the 3.12 tests pass on the ARM runner too.'

checks: PR #87 has a review or comment containing the specified text

tasks.description: Create a new label called `performance` with color `#ff9900` and description 'Performance-related issues', then apply it to issue #78.

expected_output.note: Issue #78 is the retry config enhancement.

tasks.description: For each milestone in the repo (including closed ones), report the total number of issues, how many are open vs closed, and the completion percentage. Which milestone is fully complete?

criteria: Reports on v1.0.0 milestone: 3 issues, all closed, 100% complete
Reports on v1.1.0 milestone: 6 issues, all closed, 100% complete
Reports on v2.0 milestone: 4 issues, all open, 0% complete
Correctly identifies v1.0.0 and v1.1.0 as fully complete
Identifies v2.0 as the only incomplete milestone

tasks.description: Find all issues that have more than one label. For each, list the issue title and all its labels. Which label pair appears together most frequently?

criteria: Identifies multi-label issues including: #74 (bug,exporter), #77 (bug,critical), #79 (enhancement,exporter), #76 (docs,good-first-issue), #81 (enhancement,exporter), #83 (bug,ci), #84 (enhancement,v2.0), #85 (bug,exporter)
Lists the correct labels for each issue
Identifies that bug+exporter is the most common pair (appears on #74, #85, and closed issues #69)
Also notes enhancement+exporter as a common pair (#79, #81)
Includes both open and/or closed issues in the analysis

tasks.description: Which open issues are not assigned to any milestone? Group them by their primary label (bug, enhancement, docs). Are there any critical bugs without a milestone?

criteria: Identifies 8 open issues without a milestone: #74, #76, #77, #79, #80, #82, #83, #85
Groups by label: bugs (#74, #77, #82, #83, #85), enhancements (#79), docs (#76, #80)
Flags #77 as a critical bug without a milestone
Notes that all v2.0 milestone issues are enhancements, while most bugs have no milestone
Provides reasonable recommendations or observations about the gap

tasks.description: Audit the open PRs: for each one, report whether it has reviews, whether CI passed, whether there are merge conflicts, and how old it is.

criteria: Lists all 3 open PRs
Reports review status: PR #86 approved, PR #87 no reviews, PR #88 no reviews (draft)
Reports CI status for each PR
Reports merge conflict status
Reports age or creation date for each PR

tasks.description: Find all issues that were opened and closed within the same milestone. What was the average time from open to close?

criteria: Identifies closed issues in v1.0.0 and v1.1.0 milestones
Computes time from open to close for each
Reports average time (likely very short since issues were created and closed in the same script run)
Notes that the timestamps may be artificial

tasks.description: Search for all issues that mention 'exporter' in their title. How do these compare to issues with the `exporter` label? Are there any mismatches — issues that mention 'exporter' but aren't labeled, or issues labeled `exporter` that don't mention it in the title?

criteria: Searches for issues with 'exporter' in the title
Lists issues with the exporter label
Identifies that most exporter-titled issues do have the label
Notes any mismatches (e.g., 'Batch exporter drops last batch on shutdown' #77 mentions exporter in title but does not have the exporter label)
Provides a clear comparison between the two sets

tasks.description: Which open issues have zero comments? Of those, which are bugs? Are there any bugs that seem urgent (labeled `critical`) but have no discussion at all?

criteria: Identifies that almost all open issues have zero comments (11 of 12)
Notes that issue #74 is the only one with comments (2 comments)
Lists the bugs with zero comments: #77, #82, #83, #85
Flags #77 as critical priority with no comments/discussion
Provides reasonable observations about the lack of triage activity

tasks.description: Compare the v1.0.0 and v1.1.0 milestones: how many issues were in each, what was the ratio of bugs to enhancements in each, and which milestone had broader scope?

criteria: Reports v1.0.0 milestone: 3 issues, all bugs
Reports v1.1.0 milestone: 6 issues, 2 bugs and 4 enhancements
Notes that v1.1.0 had broader scope (twice as many issues, mix of bugs and features)
v1.0.0 was purely a bugfix release while v1.1.0 was a feature release
Both milestones are fully closed with all issues resolved
